title: Kumanovo, Northeastern — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kumanovo, Northeastern: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kumanovo is a city in Northeastern with a population of 70,000. The second-largest city in North Macedonia, known for its tobacco industry, the Kokino megalithic observatory, and the historic Kumanovo Fortress.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
